a:T7bf3,<div class="specification">
<p>The following diagram shows the quadrilateral ABCD.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: left;">AB = 6.73 cm, BC = 4.83 cm, BĈD = 78.2° and CD = 3.80 cm.</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Find BD.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>The area of triangle ABD is 18.5 cm<sup>2</sup>. Find the possible values of <em>θ</em>.</p>
<div class="marks">[4]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>b:Tf32,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
